title: ipomoea pes-tigridis var. strigosa
intro: Ipomoea pes-tigridis var. strigosa, also known as Japanese morning glory, is a variety of morning glory plant native to Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea pes-tigridis var. strigosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and it can also be used to make a tincture or dried powder for medicinal purposes.
